title: Low Cost LAMP and RT-LAMP
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5kqk3","text":"This protocol collection specifies how to carry out LAMP or RT-LAMP (reverse transcription - Loop-mediated isothermal amplification) reactions with homemade reagents and home-brewed enzymes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"elela","text":"It describes how to prepare all the solutions and buffers to perform the reactions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8e8pt","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b6266","text":"This collection was developed in the context of COVID-19 pandemic to provide access to RT-LAMP tools in accordance with the principles of ReClone community initiative. It is the result of information exchange and reagent sharing with a huge community of collaborators from ReClone, gLAMP and JOGL.   ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":138,"length":7}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"B8E503EC748F11EBA67A0A58A9FEAC2A","url":"https://reclone.org/"}}}}
creator: Tamara Matute
